text: This trade-press article reports on Viasat’s public description of the KA-SAT incident as a deliberate, multifaceted cyberattack that affected thousands of modems in Ukraine and across Europe. It summarises the company’s explanation of service disruptions and notes that the outage impacted consumer broadband customers as well as industrial installations such as wind turbines. The piece emphasises the scale of the disruption, references the timing at the start of the war, and presents Viasat’s communications to the satellite industry about steps taken to restore service.
